<section begin="seo" />{{#seo:
|title=<%~ it.name %>
|description=<%~ it.seoDescription %>
|image=<%~ it.icon %>
|image_alt=<%~ it.name %> icon
|twitter_card=summary
}}<section end="seo" />
<section begin="infobox" />{{Infobox resource
|name=<%~ it.name %>
|api_name=<%~ it.apiName %>
|icon=<%~ it.icon %>
<% if (it.rarity) { -%>
|rarity=<%~ it.rarity %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.max) { -%>
|max=<%= it.max %>
<% } -%>
<% if (it.colorHex) { -%>
|color=<%~ it.colorHex %>
<% } -%>
|is_item=<%~ it.isItem %>
<% if (it.visibility) { -%>
|visibility=<%~ it.visibility %>
<% } -%>
}}<section end="infobox" />

<section begin="description" /><%~ it.descriptionText %><section end="description" />
<% if (it.usedByUpgrades) { %>
<section begin="used_by_upgrades" />
<%~ it.usedByUpgrades -%>
<section end="used_by_upgrades" />
<% } -%>
<% if (it.usedByGears) { %>
<section begin="used_by_gears" />
<%~ it.usedByGears -%>
<section end="used_by_gears" />
<% } -%>

<includeonly><section begin="categories" />
[[Category:Resources]]
<% if (it.rarity) { -%>
[[Category:<%= it.rarity %> Resources]]
<% } -%>
<% if (it.isItem === 'Yes') { -%>
[[Category:Items]]
<% } -%>
<section end="categories" /></includeonly>

[[Category:Auto-generated resource source pages]]
